title: Road Closures for 2023 Jazz Fest
summary: The City of Syracuse announced street closures in downtown areas (Clinton Street, Erie Boulevard West, West Water Street, and East Water Street) from June 22-25, 2023 to support the Syracuse Jazz Fest event at Hanover Square and Clinton Square. Multiple blocks will be fully closed or converted to two-way traffic with parking restrictions beginning at 6:30-7:00 a.m. on Thursday, June 22.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs

political_signal.description: City prioritizes support for major cultural events (Jazz Fest) through infrastructure coordination and public notice; demonstrates commitment to downtown activation and community programming.

processing_notes: Date discrepancy in URL path (2024) vs. publication date (2023-06-21) and event dates (June 22-24, 2023); content is internally consistent around June 2023 dates
